paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuning PaLM 8B on a high-quality technical dataset combining natural language with formal mathematical notation (MathJax/LATEX) to enable quantitative reasoning in STEM fields.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: General natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining) + 17.5B tokens from math web pages + 21B tokens from arXiv
raw_extraction.application: Solving undergraduate-level STEM problems, generating step-by-step mathematical solutions with LATEX notation, few-shot quantitative reasoning tasks (MATH, GSM8k, MMLU-STEM).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from Google's typical release policy)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in mathematics, science, and engineering problems requiring symbolic manipulation and multi-step logical deduction.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaling PaLM 62B to quantitative reasoning tasks via targeted fine-tuning on technical/scientific data, achieving state-of-the-art performance on MATH, GSM8k, and MMLU-STEM benchmarks.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: General natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining) + 17.5B tokens from math web pages + 21B tokens from arXiv
raw_extraction.application: Undergraduate-level STEM problem-solving, chain-of-thought reasoning, few-shot learning for quantitative tasks, generating detailed mathematical derivations.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in complex STEM problems requiring advanced mathematical and scientific reasoning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Extending PaLM 540B to quantitative reasoning with targeted fine-tuning on technical/scientific data, demonstrating superior performance despite being undertrained relative to smaller models due to the novel dataset design.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: General natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining) + 17.5B tokens from math web pages + 21B tokens from arXiv
raw_extraction.application: High-complexity undergraduate/graduate STEM problem-solving, generating rigorous mathematical proofs, multi-disciplinary scientific reasoning.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Advanced quantitative reasoning in STEM problems requiring deep symbolic and numerical computation.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces majority voting on sampled predictions to enhance quantitative reasoning performance, leveraging large-scale language models for multi-step problem-solving without external tools.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: High-quality mathematical dataset (including Math Web Pages, curated OCWCourses, and other sources)
raw_extraction.application: Automated problem-solving in mathematics, STEM education, tutoring, and quantitative reasoning tasks (e.g., differential equations, special relativity, solid-state chemistry).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from DeepMind's typical practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning problems requiring multi-step mathematical reasoning, including numerical calculations, symbolic manipulations, and logical deductions.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Majority voting on sampled predictions for improved reasoning accuracy
raw_extraction.extension: Majority voting on sampled predictions (k=64) to reduce false positives and improve accuracy in quantitative reasoning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of Minerva 8B with 62B parameters, demonstrating improved robustness in reasoning and calculation tasks while retaining core majority-voting inference techniques.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: High-quality mathematical dataset (including Math Web Pages, curated OCWCourses, and other sources)
raw_extraction.application: Automated problem-solving in mathematics, STEM education, tutoring, and quantitative reasoning tasks (e.g., differential equations, special relativity, solid-state chemistry).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from DeepMind's typical practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning problems requiring multi-step mathematical reasoning, including numerical calculations, symbolic manipulations, and logical deductions.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Majority voting on sampled predictions for improved reasoning accuracy
raw_extraction.extension: Majority voting on sampled predictions (k=64 for OCWCourses, k=100 for GSM8k) to reduce false positives and improve accuracy in quantitative reasoning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest variant of the Minerva series with 540B parameters, achieving state-of-the-art performance on quantitative reasoning benchmarks through majority-voting inference techniques.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: High-quality mathematical dataset (including Math Web Pages, curated OCWCourses, and other sources)
raw_extraction.application: Automated problem-solving in mathematics, STEM education, tutoring, and quantitative reasoning tasks (e.g., differential equations, special relativity, solid-state chemistry).
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (not explicitly stated, inferred from DeepMind's typical practices)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning problems requiring multi-step mathematical reasoning, including numerical calculations, symbolic manipulations, and logical deductions.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Majority voting on sampled predictions for improved reasoning accuracy
raw_extraction.extension: Majority voting on sampled predictions (k=256 for MATH, k=40 for GSM8k) to reduce false positives and improve accuracy in quantitative reasoning.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a **quantitative reasoning specialization** via fine-tuning on structured mathematical problems, including arithmetic, algebra, calculus, physics, chemistry, and biology. Uses a custom normalization pipeline for parsing and evaluating answers.
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical problem-solving, scientific reasoning, educational tutoring, automated grading of quantitative questions
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling language models to solve complex quantitative reasoning problems across STEM disciplines
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned on specialized quantitative reasoning datasets (arithmetic, algebra, calculus, physics, chemistry, biology)
raw_extraction.extension: Custom answer normalization pipeline for handling symbolic expressions, units, and numerical values
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models
